name: Dutch Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch tart or pie pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, 5 tablespoons sugar, and baking powder.
4. Cut in 2 tablespoons margarine using a pastry blender or two knives until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add egg whites, skim milk, and vanilla extract; beat until smooth.
6. Batter will be stiff. Spoon into prepared pan and spread evenly to fit the pan.
7. Arrange apple slices, overlapping, in two concentric circles to cover the batter.
8. In a small bowl, combine 3 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over the apple slices.
9. Dot with 1/2 tablespoon margarine.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
